name: SKY130 Bio-AFE System Integration
description: Full 4-channel biomedical acquisition system: bandgap + inamp + PGA + filter + ADC integrated and validated end-to-end

system_noise_uvrms.description: Total input-referred noise of full signal chain (InAmp + PGA + Filter + ADC) in 0.5-150 Hz

system_cmrr_db.description: System CMRR at 60 Hz measured from electrode input to ADC output

ecg_snr_db.description: SNR with 1 mV ECG signal at max appropriate gain setting

total_power_uw.description: Total power per channel (bandgap shared, counted once)

adc_enob_system.description: Effective resolution at system level (including analog chain noise)
